# Making a fortune from salves

Parents: Magic lights job (Magic%20lights%20job%202e058e628ba280e7b11feb451b4f28c0.md)
Priority: Low
Products: TWOLD (../Data/Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)

The light company making a fortune from magical aloe salves.

The joke is the company’s [Lights catch on fire](Lights%20catch%20on%20fire%202e058e628ba280adab44f7732cc87820.md), so they turn lemons into lemonades.
